text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 103 

DSCHRG_DT 

LABEL: Discharge Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date on which the recipient was discharged from a hospital, psychiatric, or long-term care facility. 

SHORT NAME: DSCHRG_DT 

LONG NAME: DSCHRG_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing
